steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content:
The passage describes Dalla Ragione using centuries-old cooking ingredient lists to discover fruit varieties, then introduces her analysis of Renaissance paintings as another source.

Both methods serve the same investigative purpose. The logical relationship is addition: one method plus another method, not replacement or conclusion.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
”Additionally” marks that paintings are another research method she employs alongside ingredient lists. “Instead” would falsely signal switching from one method to the other, “In sum” would suggest summary, and “Thus” would imply consequence rather than a parallel approach.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
